programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 31
programme.desc: Each team must cook two dishes - one main and one dessert. Each contestant has 20 minutes to cook and they have just 45 seconds to hand over the dish to the next contestant in the relay.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 32
programme.desc: Queen of chocolate and guest chef, Kirsten Tibballs reveals for today's pressure test, the contestants must create her wow-factor dessert, the meljito.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 33
programme.desc: The contestants lift the lids of their mystery box to find a photo sent by their loved ones. The contestants have 60 minutes to create a dish inspired by the memory in their family photo.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Contestants must create a dish inspired by one of seven classic fairytales. With an open pantry and garden, the contestant with the best dish and the strongest concept will win immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 35
programme.desc: Contestants must make a dish that has two different flavoured ice-creams that only work when they are eaten together. In round two, they must make a dish using one of five unusual flavour pairings.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Contestants cook a sweet or savoury style dish championing a citrus fruit of their choice. In round two, they use the same fruit but their dish must be in the opposite style.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Contestants discover they must create a dish inspired by chef Coskun Uysal's chicken rice pudding dessert. With this in mind, they must create their own dessert featuring a meat or protein.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Today's mystery box ingredients are decided entirely by the luck of the draw, with numbered lottery balls corresponding to 25 ingredients on display.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Each round in today's immunity challenge is worth 10 points and the contestant with the highest score at the end of round three will win immunity and be free from elimination on Sunday.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Who will make the MasterChef Australia top 10 in this Australia-themed pressure test?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 41
programme.desc: What's behind the wall?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Benjamin Cooper, Executive Chef of Chin Chin Melbourne sets tonight's pressure test where contestants must recreate his jungle curry with rice and roti... without a recipe.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 43
programme.desc: Today's mystery box is all about smoke. Contestants can use any method of smoking as long as one element has been smoked with a smoking gun.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 44
programme.desc: The contestants are each presented with a pumpkin and have to cook dishes that feature the pumpkin in some way but Jock isn't impressed by Laura's chosen dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 45
programme.desc: Charlie Carrington of Melbourne restaurant, Atlas sets today's elimination challenge focusing on food from different countries. But will a big risk send one contestant home?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A golden mystery box pushes the limits of the contestants' creativity. Those with the top four dishes will battle it out in tomorrow's immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 47
programme.desc: Every five minutes an ingredient that can be used in their cook is revealed to our contestants. They can start cooking at any time but only have access to the ingredients revealed up to that point.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 48
programme.desc: Tonight's elimination will take place over two rounds, the first of which is the classic blind taste test. The first four contestants who guess incorrectly will go into round two.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 49
programme.desc: The judges reveal that today contestants need to use ALL the ingredients in their mystery box to create two dishes â€“ a sweet and savoury dish, all in just 75 minutes.

programme.desc: Three heavy hitters of the competition go head to head. Who will make top 6?

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The honeymoon period is over as Vicky and Ricci split. Rebecca reveals her secret party trick, much to Jay's delight, whilst Gary comes clean with Charlotte. It's pure mental like! (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: It's almost the end of the gang's time in the house, and hardly any relationships are left intact. Vicky and Ricci move on, Sophie gets dumped and Jay leaves a bad taste in Rebecca's mouth. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 250
programme.desc: The Reunion brings the cast and their friends & families together to find out what really went down during series 2. Host Russell Kane will rummage through the tensions, passions, laughter and tears.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: It's time to swap the grey river Tyne for the crystal blue waters of Cancun, Mexico for the carnage of Spring break! Vicky and Ricci are loved up, whilst Jay is missing the love of his life. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: With the house reduced to carnage and Sophie losing even more faith in boyfriend Joel, there are still plenty of beaches to party on. Meanwhile Holly ups her game in the pursuit of James. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sophie is elated as Joel surprises her with a visit. But will he be able to behave himself? And with everyone fearing that his worldie mission may now be over, Holly moves in on her prey. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: The chaos in Cancun continues as Gaz celebrates his birthday in true Geordie style. Charlotte takes her holiday romance to the next level. Vicky erupts as Cancun Chris gets sweet revenge. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Vicky and Ricci return to the house in time for Becca's birthday which goes off in usual Geordie style. Sophie sends Joel back to England, but it's not long before she regrets the decision. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: An unexpected call means James has to choose between his best mates and Holly. Gary has another threesome and a night out trying to forget about Gary ends in disaster for Charlotte. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: The boy-girl divide returns! Charlotte and Gaz aren't speaking, Becca and Jay are continually arguing, while Holly and James' nurse-patient relationship is back to strictly professional. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: It's the final few days of spring break and the house is rocked by the loss of yet another member. In the last hours, to the disbelief of everyone, Ricci plans his proposal to Vicky. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: After a fun filled summer in Cancun the Geordie Shore gang are back with a bang! With two new spaces in the house, it can only mean one thing, fresh meat for the family!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: The gang throw Ricci and Vicky an engagement party to remember. There'll be booze and banter aplenty, but it turns into a night that everyone will remember for all the wrong reasons.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With Ricci and Sophie having been asked to leave the house, the rest of the Geordie Shore gang decide a road trip to Liverpool is in order to check out the clubs and talent.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore house is a far from happy place with Vicky and Sophie still not talking and the rest of the house caught in the divide... it's stormy seas ahead at the Shore.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: Peace has finally been restored in the house now that Vicky and Sophie have made up, but nothing lasts forever and when Ricci sees red on a family night out, disaster strikes.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: It's James' birthday and the gang plan a surprise trip to Dublin to celebrate with a secret guest, but on their return their high is brought down by Ricci's return with some bad news.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: With Ricci gone from the Geordie Shore house, the rest of the gang are determined to keep Vicky's spirits up and the boys decide that what better way than a walk on the wild side - camping!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: It's all coming to an end in the house with some keener to leave than others. Before they pack their bags, there's time for a big bash, Geordie style, and it seems like love is all around.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore gang are back in a pimped up pad and ready to cause chaos once again. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: The gang return from Amsterdam and it's time to tear Newcastle a new one. Vicky and Ricci celebrate breaking the Geordie Shore relationship curse and the gang try out speed dating. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: There's tension in the Toon, as James brings girlfriend Kate on a night out, leaving Holly unimpressed. The Geordie Shore house explodes as Vicky and Ricci have a row to remember. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: The Geordie Tour of Europe is back on as the gang are off to Prague for banter, birds, & booze. The girls get their guns out at the shooting range whilst the boys visit the local strip clubs (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: The gang return from Prague to a turbulent Toon. The house is in total meltdown as Charlotte and Gary finally come to blows, and it looks like it could be the end for Vicky and Ricci (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: Charlotte returns to the Geordie Shore house just in time to join the rest of the gang on a Geordie Tour of Barcelona. Our favourite Geordies bathe in the Spanish sun, sea, sex and sangria.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: The gang return from Barcelona with Charlotte's declaration of love for Gary still hanging in the air and Vicky set for a final showdown with Ricci (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: With the gang cooling off after the biggest fight in the show's history, there's an icy atmosphere between the boys and the girls as they're off to the Alps for their final Geordie Tour (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Holly and James still haven't put their differences behind them and are a war zone waiting to happen, Gary and Scott are on a mission to pull every girl in Sydney. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: John enters the diner from Reggie's apartment, trying to sneak out.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's being sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chris, Jake, Hector, and Linda are at the diner. Chris serves Linda her breakfast as John walks in and tells Linda that she needs to get to the office and help Margaret.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the diner to find Reggie and Jake discussing their plans to take a sculpting class.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Becker is bombarded by sexual overtones throughout the day, beginning with a sensual dream that is interrupted by a neighbor's blaring music.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While Becker is at the diner with Jake and Reggie, an odd little man named Bob enters.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Becker is livid when he is awakened by a brightly flickering streetlight outside his window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Becker throws his back out at home while trying to close a stuck window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Already in a bad mood, Becker vents his frustration to a man on his cell phone, whose wife is in labor.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A reporter makes trouble for Becker when he writes an article depicting Becker's "non-politically correct" behavior.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Becker promises a friend that he will write a medical article for him, but gets frustrated with numerous distractions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When Becker arrives at the diner on Valentine’s Day, he is displeased to find wall-to-wall make-out sessions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker has a fear that midgets bring him bad luck and is spooked by the new water guy, who happens to be vertically challenged.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker learns that an elderly patient, Mr. Fowler, has suffered from a heart attack and calls his daughter to tell her the bad news.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker is upset when he learns that his ex-wife has written a pop-psychology book starring him as "Angry Man."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy Award-winning duo The Chainsmokers join Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to cringe at some BITERS, ride STOLEN MATTRESSES and marvel at the magic of real-life TELEPORTERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, dedicated to the smart people who make our world a better place, Rob, Steelo and Chanel take a look at some lesser-known NERDACHIEVEMENTS, the dark side of science, with TRIAL AND TERROR

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 721
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have NASCAR's Chase Elliott talk about "Hall Of Fame Dads," suffer a "Victory Lapse," and get a helping hand from some "Personal Pit Crews."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 826
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling look for some "Everyday Peens", watch some videos get "Dog Bombed" and check out some people who have serious "Motor Skills".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes WWE Diva, Paige, to learn what it's like to be "Born Badass," watch some "Everyday Divas" throwdown and learn there's no better insults than some "Proper Smack."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, trick shot superstars Dude Perfect joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to enjoy some "Dudebrations", witness the pain of "Dud Perfect," and learn about the dangers of "Bad Garretts."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: On a new episode of Ridiculousness, actor and rapper Machine Gun Kelly joins Rob to celebrate "Wild Boys," fend off the "Fun Police" and learn you can never be too scared of "Sky Coffins."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, talkshow host Steve Wilkos joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some SURPRISE TITTIES, call STEVECURITY and watch the HIGHEST RATED CATEGORY EVER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 816
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some "White Whines", attend an "Animals Anonymous" meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country "Slamburbia."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 829
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, stunt person and Nitro Circus star Jolene Van Vugt stops by to get destructive with "Smash Happy," capture the perfect monkey moments in "Right Place, Right Monkey,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 29
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Post Malone joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to ball with some REALLY WHITE IVERSONS, get messy with the category SAUCIN' ON YOU and show off some KNUCKLE TATS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 719
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, country music star Tyler Farr teaches Rob, Chanel, and Sterling the healing power of "Redneck Therapy," how-to "Suffer In Peace" and what it means to have "Outside Junk."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 819
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Super Bowl 50 Champs DeMarcus Ware and Von Miller join Rob and the crew to try out for the "Swat Team," round up some "Attack Chickens," and file to the IRS to become "Fart Tax Exempt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Tonight on Ridiculousness, comedian Eric Andre returns to check out some "Power Dicks", watch people go tongue to tongue in the category "Unexpected Mouth Mates" and get sticky with his favorite dressing.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Olympic Gold Medalist Kaitlyn Farrington joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about "Other Sochi Games", "Pokeaphobia" and what it means to be a "Virgin Larper".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 830
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski to learn what it's like to be "Unwakeable," the dangers of being "Bus Blind" and experience the strange aggression of "Mild Boys."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to "Keep It On The Green," run in terror from "Ja Ghouls" and be driven crazy by "These Damn Kids!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel hang out with artist/producer Dillon Francis to talk some "Wack Smack," learn how to party correctly in "They Did It Right"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Travis Scott is here to show Rob, Chanel and Sterling what it's like "Getting Action Figured," fend off the "Antidote Side Effects," and celebrate with some "Masters Of The Dark."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass legend Danger Ehren teaches Rob, Steelo and Chanel the pain of GETTING DONKEY'D, how to avoid DENTAL DANGER and get adorable with some WHISKEY PETS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by none other than Rob's dad, Gene Dyrdek who teaches the gang about THE POWER OF MAGNETS, that it's NEVER TOO LATE and the mysterious GREY GUNNERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 710
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel meet with motorcycle madman Robbie Maddison showcase some "Mini Madd Asses", cause some serious "Grammage"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 808
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Hampton Yount joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to check out the danger of "Risky Bits", listen to some "Next Level Narrators" and learn what it means to get "Hamspired".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On a very special awards show episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel give out Ridicky Awards such as "THE BIGGEST DICK", "THE FREEDOM FALCON" and "THE GRAND SLAM" to the stars of some of the greatest clips from the last 10 seasons.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, things get grosser than ever when Rob, Chanel, and Steelo check out some talented ASS MASTERS, avoid the BOOGIE KNIGHTS and discover the disgusting side of MOTHER BIRDING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On a special episode of Major Key-diculousness, DJ Khaled teaches Rob, Chanel and Sterling how to be GRATEFUL, how to avoid THEY and how to get LOST AT SKI.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 825
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, the hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Mark Cuban joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss future investments in the MARK TANK, try to solve the CUBAN BATHROOM CRISIS and explore the DANGERS OF DUNKING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 727
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Chris "Drama" Pfaff sits down with Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Fully Reckless," go on some "Sketchy Flights" and get saved in time by "Life Savers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Big Baby D.R.A.M. joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get into some BAD BROCCOLI, learn how to speak UNCLISH and fend off a few URBAN PREDATORS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn a new game called TRAFFIC TAG, receive some DICK TIPS and things get messy when they POP THE MAN-PAGNE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get to the bottom of fake news with VIDEO OR DIDN'T HAPPEN, describe the joy that is a CROWDGASM, and see what happens when you take too much melatonin and go MELATONIC.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 824
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass' Dave England shows Rob, Chanel, and Sterling what it takes to inspire a generation of "Poo Pros," gets careless with some "Bad Daddies" and the agony of getting "Butt Hurt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the SNACK ZONE, learn the dangers of hiring BUDGET BABYSITTERS and root on reckless golf cart drivers in COUNTRY CLUB DRIFT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 718
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motocross champion Ryan Villopoto joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to learn when it's "Time To Retire," start some "Workplace Throwdowns"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 817
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling are joined by the coolest granny in the game, Baddie Winkle, who teaches us how to stay young in "Fountain of Baddie,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo witness WORLD WAR BEE, diagnose a medical condition known as BACKFLIP BLOCK, and avoid stray tires in THE WHEEL WORLD.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, NASCAR's Bubba Wallace sits with Rob, Stee-lo and Chanel to drive fast and hard in "Trading Paint," play some "Next Level Games" and get into some road rage throwdowns in "Street Heat."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 827
programme.desc: Tonight on an all-new Ridiculousness, the legendary television host Jerry Springer joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to chant "Jerry! Jerry! Jerry!", watch some "Beastdowns" and post some photos on "Injurgram."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, 50 Cent joins Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel to discuss his "Crappy Birthday," people who are "Built Like 50," and others who, like 50, are real "Show Stealers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt"."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Tonight on an all new Ridiculousness, the crew is joined by multi-platinum singer/songwriter Leona Lewis to watch some of her fellow "Aisle Trolls", be misunderstood while "Speaking Leonese"

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policemen try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 27
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 28
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 29

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 30
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 31
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 32
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 18

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 19

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 21

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Ashley York murders her wealthy father and cleverly manipulates it to appear as though he killed himself. Dr. Sloan picks away at holes in the story, which leads him directly to Ashley.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan takes in an abandoned young girl found at the scene of a murder, while Steve and Jesse go about tracking down the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 3

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan suspects a cunning D.A. in the murder of an acquitted defendant.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 5

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan shields George Karn from both Steve and Lt. Delaney while investigating his wife's murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Steve heads up the investigation when a serial cop killer is on the prowl, while inadvertently dating the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: An exhausted Jesse, coming off a 48-hour stint in the hospital, witnesses a man die in the parking garage. Jesse returns with help only to find the man alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Amanda's cousin falls to his death when his motorcycle suddenly veers off the road. Amanda leads the investigation when it's discovered her cousin was drugged immediately before the accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a free health clinic after several homeless people turn up dead... with missing organs.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan tries to solve a friend's murder while Steve investigates the deceased's ex-wife and her identical twin sister.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A visiting surgeon must deal with his alcoholism after a fellow doctor is murdered during one of his blackouts.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When a photoshop erroneously sends Dr. Sloan the wrong set of photographs, he becomes embroiled in the murder investigation of an escort girl. Meanwhile, Amanda's baby is about to come to term.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In an episode reminiscent of Hitchcock's Strangers on a Train, Dr. Sloan is drawn into a murder pact by a psychiatrist in need of money. The psychiatrist kills a woman pestering Dr. Sloan, expecting Mark to eliminate his problem.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jesse is attracted to a beautiful psychic, who also happens to be the prime suspect in a murder. Amanda copes with the trials of motherhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 16

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Mark investigates a perky morning television personality for the murder of a Howard Stern-like radio host.
